song_name: Paul Mccartney - No More Lonely Nights
version_description: Track one from the soundtrack of Give My Regards to Broad Street ,by Paul McCartney released in 1984 ,the single reached number 2 in the uk charts and featured David Gilmour on lead guitar You Tube link to this song https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-T_ZkacL9A0.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Paul McCartney - No More Lonely Nights  1984 (Give My Regards To Broad Street

Key: F   BPM:88

You Tube Links https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y3Xn9A4Negk
               https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-T_ZkacL9A0.

[ch]A7[/ch]    x02020.
[ch]C/Bb[/ch]  x10010    [ch]Abm7[/ch]   464444    xxx103


[Verse 1]
[tab]                   [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Dm/C[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Dm/C[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab][ch]C/Bb[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Dm/C[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Gm7/C[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]                     [ch]Gm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]Dm/C[/ch]
